title: qrafty's Moony Endstone
description: Achieving a more dreamy and moony look by altering the colors of the endstone palette! 🌙☁️
body:
# Ever wanted the end to look like the moon? 🌙☁️
This pack alters the colors of endstone, endstone bricks (including all variants!) and the endportal frame to make them look more moony! 

![BEFORE AND AFTER IMAGE OF THE END](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ec8b3577e9f4a8708ce10ac14b3f1bc570692f9b_0.webp)

![DISCORD INVITE](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6a250108b13f3501a4d957024dd1abe6d2312a7c.png)
## [DISCORD INVITE](https://www.qrafty.net/discord)
